extraction_results.applicable_row_index: F-450 Chassis Cab 4x2 DRW (145.3" WB, 60" CA)
extraction_results.extracted_text: Front Axle Type: Monobeam Non-Driving Steer Axle (Wide-Track configuration, Dana Super 60 design variant). Coil spring suspension standard on all 4x2 and 4x4 F-450/550 Chassis Cab configurations.

extraction_results.document_section: Chassis Dimensions - Front Track & Overall Width
extraction_results.extracted_text: Tread (Track) Front - F-450 Dual Rear Wheel (DRW): 74.8 inches (1899.92 mm). Maximum Overall Width across front sheet metal/fenders (including wide-track wheel lip molding extension): 93.9 inches (2385.06 mm).
Width of Frame Outer Edge to Outer Edge (Behind Cab to Rear End of Frame): 34.2 inches (868.7 mm) flat-surface spacing. Flange width: 3.0 inches (76.2 mm). Web thickness: 0.28 inches (7.1 mm).
Steel (Standard 4x2) or Forged Polished Aluminum (Optional). Bolt pattern: 10-hole, 225 mm pitch circle diameter (PCD). Wheel center pilot bore: 170.1 mm (6.697 inches).

extraction_results.document_section: Section 204-00: Wheel Alignment & Diagonal Measurement Standards
extraction_results.applicable_row_index: Chassis Cab F-Series SD Heavy Frame Rails
extraction_results.extracted_text: The diagonal alignment deviation (X-measurement between matching crossmember or bumper reference holes) must not exceed 5.0 mm (0.196 inches) across any 2.0-meter span. Total frame rail twist/parallel deviation must not exceed 3.0 mm.
